durable_improvement.summary: Integrated the exact-commit dispatch-decision builder into the Cloudflare environment preflight workflow.

progress: Preflight source changes now retrigger when the dispatch builder or its tests change.
The preflight gate now runs the dispatch-decision test suite.
A verified preflight verdict is transformed into a fail-closed decision bound to the exact repository and commit.
The decision is asserted, hashed, and retained in the uploaded artifact.

verification.source: exact-commit fetch confirmed committed workflow behavior
verification.runtime: GitHub Actions conclusion not yet observed

remaining_blocker: Configure valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment, observe a successful preflight artifact containing cloudflare-dispatch-decision.json, then dispatch the production workflow at the exact approved commit.
required_closure_evidence: dispatch_ready decision artifact bound to exact commit
served identity and deployed commit proof
claim_boundary: No deployment, hostname, credential, diagnosis, treatment, payment, or scientific-truth claim is made.
